name: @generata/coding
description: Spec-driven coding pipeline: dream, plan, audit, code, review.

requiredBins.name: terminal-notifier
requiredBins.hint: Optional, macOS only: brew install terminal-notifier

postInstall:
1. Edit generata.config.ts to set workDir (where NOTES.md and projects/ live)
  2. Add ideas to NOTES.md
  3. Run: pnpm generata workflow build-project
